claim: What is the largest personal healthcare expenditure category in 2022?
label: Hospital care
thought: I need to access data on current health expenditure. The most relevant action is to select the "Line" graph, as it will provide a clear visual representation of the expenditure trends over time, which can help identify the largest categories.
data:
Category,Expenditure
Hospital Care,2000
Physician Services,950
Nursing Care,700
Dental Services,300
Prescription Drugs,400
Other,600
code:
import pandas as pd

def answer_question(df):
    largest_category = df.loc[df['Expenditure'].idxmax()]
    return largest_category['Category']
